# gateway

> QARoom gateway: the external API fronting content-service. Validates at the edge,
> rate-limits, and proxies posts/votes/feed.

The machine-readable contract is `openapi.yaml` (OpenAPI 3.0, generated from Zod).
Live capabilities at `GET /system/capabilities` (MCP-tool-shaped); observable state at
`GET /system/state`. Errors are RFC 7807 `application/problem+json` with `retryable`,
`next_actions`, `failure_domain` (incl. `rate_limit` on 429 and `dependency_failure` on 502).

## Operations
- POST /api/communities/{communityId}/posts — createPost (mutating; Idempotency-Key)
- GET  /api/communities/{communityId}/feed  — listCommunityFeed
- GET  /api/posts/{postId}                   — getPost
- POST /api/posts/{postId}/votes             — castVote (mutating; Idempotency-Key)
- GET  /system/state | /system/capabilities | /system/limits

## Docs
- Contract: ./openapi.yaml
- Agent reference: ./AGENTS.md
- Repo conventions: /AGENTS.md, /docs
